inputs.label: LDL Cholesterol (optional)
inputs.businessContext: Low-density lipoprotein cholesterol, if known; otherwise computed from other values

businessContext_i18n.en: Low-density lipoprotein cholesterol, if known; otherwise computed from other values
businessContext_i18n.tr: Düşük yoğunluklu lipoprotein kolesterol, biliniyorsa; aksi halde diğer değerlerden hesaplanır

businessContext_i18n.es: Colesterol de lipoproteínas de baja densidad, si se conoce; de lo contrario, se calcula a partir de otros valores

formulas.ldl: ldlCholesterol == null ? totalCholesterol - hdlCholesterol - triglycerides / 5 : ldlCholesterol

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
